title: aristolochia sempervirens subsp. altissima
intro: Aristolochia sempervirens subsp. altissima, also known as the Evergreen Birthwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Aristolochiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce fever and relieve pain. In herbal preparations, Aristolochia sempervirens subsp. altissima is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
